title: tabernaemontana juruana
intro: Tabernaemontana juruana, also known as Chacruna or Ayahuasca, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant's medicinal properties are derived from its alkaloids, specifically harmine and tetrahydroharmine, which have been used in traditional medicine for centuries to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana juruana include its potential to aid in addiction recovery, reduce anxiety and depression, and promote spiritual growth, although further research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in traditional Amazonian medicine, including brewing the leaves into a tea, which is then consumed in shamanic rituals.
